items.title: Thunder’s Rotation after losing Isaiah, Dort,Wiggins. Starters: SGA, Cason, J Dub, Chet, Hartenstein. Bench: Ajay, McCain,Caruso, Kenrich, Jaylin, Aday, Stirtz.
items.author: OrganicHunt952
items.body_excerpt: What are your impressions on OKC’s depth now they have lost some of their depth pieces, due to the salary cap? Last year SGA was able to rest in 4th quarters because of blow outs and depth. Was a big reason why they had a stellar regular season record, even with numerous…
